scope: Headless GUT shutdown after all project tests. Raw counts include Godot-held global script classes; they may only be recalibrated after an audited pinned GF vendor-tree or project runtime class-set change, and must not grow while both inputs remain unchanged.
calibration_reason: The audited asset-review workflow adds AssetSourceExclusionIndex and PurgeRejectedAssets to the project script class set and adds two GUT scripts, expanding the complete suite from 34/294 to 36/302 scripts/tests. The complete run remains stable at ObjectDB 309, Resources 131, and TextureStorage, ShapedText, and Font RID allocations 11/9/5. The class-count increase is confined to the expanded script and test discovery set, with no new retained Node, Resource, or RID category.
